action_set_definitions.name: get_batch_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the ledger information for a specific batch ID, including product name, current location, current status, and production timestamp.

batch_id.description: The unique identifier for the food batch (e.g., 'CS-404').

action_set_definitions.name: trace_genealogy
action_set_definitions.description: Traces the ingredients (upstream) or the products created from a batch (downstream).

batch_id.description: The batch ID to trace from.

direction.description: Direction of trace: 'upstream' for ingredients/raw materials, 'downstream' for finished goods/distributed lots.

action_set_definitions.name: get_inspection_records
action_set_definitions.description: Queries lab results and quality control logs for a specific batch to identify pathogens or safety failures.

action_set_definitions.name: update_batch_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the status of a specific batch in the ledger (e.g., to 'recalled' or 'quarantined').

action_set_definitions.name: update_recall_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Adds a formal entry to the global recall registry detailing the root cause and all affected batches.

root_cause_batch_id.description: The ID of the batch identified as the source of contamination.

affected_batch_ids.description: A list of all contaminated finished goods batch IDs.

reason.description: Detailed explanation of the contamination and tracing logic.

state_description.batch_ledger: A list of food batches currently in the supply chain, including their current location, status (e.g., 'active', 'recalled', 'quarantined'), and production date.
state_description.movement_history: A chronological log of transfers between supply chain nodes (e.g., Supplier -> Distribution Center -> Retailer) linked by batch IDs.
state_description.inspection_records: A mapping of batch IDs to laboratory test results, safety certificates, and quality control logs.
state_description.supply_chain_nodes: Details about facilities involved, including facility type (farm, plant, warehouse, store) and contact credentials.
state_description.recall_registry: A list of active recall orders, specifying the affected products, batches, and the reason for recall (e.g., pathogen detection).

movement_history.description: Full sanitation cycle; Silo-1 emptied and cleaned prior to new shipment receipt.

RM-E-101.notes: Retest triggered by downstream positive CS-404.
